error_signature: URL parameters don't work on staging
title: URL parameters not functioning in staging environment
symptom: When testing a deep link with URL parameters in the staging environment, the loading never completes. However, it works fine in the editor.
applies_when: Using URL parameters to pass data
not_this_if: The issue does not occur in the editor or production environment
root_cause: The staging environment may not handle URL parameters correctly when navigating directly to a page. This can lead to workflows not triggering as expected, causing indefinite loading.
fix_steps: Remove URL paths from the parameters
Use query parameters instead of URL paths in the workflow
Implement a workflow on the destination page to handle the query parameters and fetch the necessary data
agent_instruction: Switch to using query parameters in your workflow for the staging environment.
